title: Files, Descriptors, Locks, and RAII-Like C Patterns · Mastery Check
summary: A safety board presents unfamiliar files, descriptors, locks, and raii-like c patterns decisions across code, diagrams, diagnostics, and stakeholder evidence; each distractor corresponds to a named misconception. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for uniform resource-lifetime wrapper. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Model external handles as scarce lifetime-bound resources even when their storage is not heap memory.
Pair acquisition with one idempotent or guarded release operation and a valid empty state.
Use compiler cleanup attributes only behind a documented extension boundary with equivalent standard-C control flow.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Resource Not Memory · changed case · Quiz Resource Not Memory
steps.instruction:
quiz case — A quiz native-systems team handles memory case 9891. Produce bounded C evidence to release nested resources once in reverse acquisition order; change the size, lifetime, failure, or ownership condition; print the observed result and invariant. Instant code stays inside the PicoC practice subset. C23 syntax, current GCC and Clang, optimization, ABI, threads, sanitizers, analyzers, fuzzers, operating-system resources, foreign runtimes, load, and production behavior require named controlled transfer gates.
